speaker: spk_0
sentence: In this video, we'll walk through a simple yet practical hospital conversation in Korean with clear English translations.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Let's learn together 1 sentence at a time.

speaker: spk_2
sentence: Please have a seat over here.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Now I'll check your blood pressure.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Your blood pressure is normal too.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: The doctor will be with you shortly.

speaker: spk_1
sentence: I have a headache and a fever.

speaker: spk_3
sentence: Do you have any other symptoms?

speaker: spk_1
sentence: I also have a slight cough.

speaker: spk_3
sentence: Your throat is a bit swollen and you have a fever.

speaker: spk_3
sentence: I'll prescribe some medicine. It's a cold.

speaker: spk_3
sentence: Take this medicine 3 times a day.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Here's your prescription. Please take it to the pharmacy.

speaker: spk_3
sentence: Don't overwork yourself and get enough rest.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: You're back. Are your symptoms better?

speaker: spk_2
sentence: Pyeongwon. Hospital. Hanja. Patient. Luisa. Doctor. Nurse: Yeea. Appointment: Seongam.

speaker: spk_2
sentence: Fever: Head: to hurt: cough medicine pharmacy Prescription to examine symptom normal blood pressure temperature throat swollen cold overwork rest 3 times a day to get better to improve to be relieved Just a moment.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Great job everyone. Practice these lines daily and you'll get better every day.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Don't forget to like, share and subscribe for more Korean learning videos.
